hero.subtitle: JEMP creates your personal training plan — tailored to your sport, your level, and your equipment.

features.subtitle: No generic training plan. Everything is based on your profile.

items.title: Sport-specific
items.description: Whether boxer, sprinter, or basketball player — your plan is tailored to your sport.

items.title: Level-adaptive
items.description: The system evaluates your current level and scales with you as you improve.

items.title: Your Equipment
items.description: Only exercises you can do with the equipment you actually have.

items.title: Track Progress
items.description: See how you improve week by week — with clear metrics.

features.centerSubtitle: Personalized down to the last detail.

earlyAccess.subtitle: Enter your email and secure early access to JEMP — the training plan built around you.

waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch!
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
